title: Swimming Dynasty
description:
Take your mark... Go! Create up to 5 characters, upgrade your swimmer, recruit swimmers to improve your team and climb to the top division. Build your team from scratch and compete for the championship! Start your dynasty now!

Key Features

Character CustomizationCreate and customize up to 5 characters, one for each type of stroke: Backstroke, Breaststroke, Butterfly, Freestyle, and All Around. Upgrade them to their max potential to dominate the competition.

Recruit SwimmersAsk recruits questions to figure out what their interests are. They'll give you hints to what matters most to them. Discuss what they like and interest increases, discuss what they don't like and their interest will decrease. Be strategic to sign the best players! The higher division you are in the easier it will be to recruit higher caliber swimmers.

Manage RosterChoose which events you want each swimmer to compete in to have the best chance of winning each meet. Choose which swimmers to cut when new recruits are added.

Achievements, Unlockables and MoreUpgrade, unlock characters and unlock cosmetics the old school way, by earning them! You won't find any microtransactions here
description_short: Take your mark... Go! Create up to 5 characters, upgrade your swimmers, recruit swimmers to improve your team and climb to the top division. Build your team from scratch and compete for the championship! Start your dynasty now!
